title: syntherisma marginata
intro: Syntherisma marginata, also known as the fringe lichen, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Lichinaceae. This plant is rich in usnic acid, a compound with potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Syntherisma marginata include its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Syntherisma marginata is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to address various health concerns, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
